min_required_version_ios.description: Minimum iOS app version required. Users below this version will see a force update dialog.

min_required_version_android.description: Minimum Android app version required. Users below this version will see a force update dialog.

latest_version_ios.description: Latest available iOS app version. Users below this version will see an optional update dialog.

latest_version_android.description: Latest available Android app version. Users below this version will see an optional update dialog.

update_url_ios.description: App Store URL for iOS app updates.

update_url_android.description: Play Store URL for Android app updates.
